item.name: Raigo Pipe
item.description: An otherworldly flute that, when played, summons the armored Mado steed, Raigo.

mount.name: Raigo
mount.action: Summon forth Raigo. Whether or not he heeds the call depends entirely on the number of bloodied laurels in your crown.
mount.description: The most daunting of Mado horses, Raigo eclipses its unholy brethren Goten and Ginga in both size and ferocity. As such, the creature will not suffer the burden of carrying a soul unbloodied, and therefore unworthy.
mount.tooltip:
Your inner horse,
my dear adventurer,
must be a steed of rare beauty.
- Golden Uma Yoriki
